narrative:
Precinct Huntington Twp (precinct in Lorain County) has 953 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
